spec_match.rationale: Perfect native logging comparing lastMouseupSel range against click event range on the fly, with beautiful timestamp delta logic.

interactive.rationale: Offers noisy checkboxes like Track selectionchange and Track mousemove to tweak granularity of interactive outputs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment with the Selection History Log description.

edge_cases.rationale: Superb progressive feedback: auto-analyzes browser conformance in-page and renders clear green/red success alerts based on true execution behavior.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5298387739082752.

design_system.rationale: Dashboard layout matches other retro charts and is responsive.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5298387739082752, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
